description: Wave 1 - M02 Camera Adapter: Implement camera event adapter with simulator support, event normalization, and health monitoring. Branch: feat/m02-camera-adapter
steps: Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/camera/interface.go defining CameraAdapter interface: Connect, Health, SubscribeEvents, GetSnapshot, GetCapabilities, Close
Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/camera/types.go with RawCameraEvent, CameraHealth, CameraCapabilities structs
Create services/gateway-server/internal/adapters/camera/simulator/scenarios.go with predefined scenarios: occupied, vacant, offline, duplicate, malformed
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/normalizer/normalizer.go that converts RawCameraEvent to domain EventEnvelope
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/normalizer/normalizer_test.go with tests for: valid event, missing fields rejection, duplicate suppression, timestamp validation
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/normalizer/dedup.go for duplicate event detection within configurable time window
Create simulators/camera/scenarios/vacant_exit.json - person exits, transition to vacant
Create simulators/camera/scenarios/out_of_order.json - events arrive out of sequence order
Ensure camera adapter never produces VACANT_CONFIRMED directly (only raw occupied/not-detected)
Ensure camera offline maps to UNKNOWN, not VACANT
Run make build and make test to confirm compilation and tests pass
acceptance_criteria: CameraAdapter interface is defined with all required methods
Simulator implements the interface and can produce various scenarios
Event normalizer correctly rejects malformed events
Duplicate events within 2s window are suppressed
Camera offline state produces UNKNOWN, never VACANT
make test succeeds with all normalizer tests passing
